creator: franco@opnsense.org
text:
Hi,

Thanks for committing.

Libhtp is not unbundled and since a few years not available as a port option in order to avoid security issues with async/missing devel/libhtp updates.

I don't maintain that port and it has no consumers in the ports tree so it really doesn't add any value since 2018, for details see https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=231839


Cheers,
Franco
